description_long: This helmet features a robust, rounded shell with a prominent central ridge running from front to back, reminiscent of the iconic Clone Trooper helmets from the Star Wars universe. The exterior is finished in a weathered, off-white color with subtle digital camouflage patterns and visible scuff marks, suggesting extensive use. The front faceplate is dominated by a black, T-shaped visor that provides full-face coverage, flanked by angular cheek guards and a pronounced brow. On each side, there are circular, mechanical details and ribbed tubes that add a technical, utilitarian appearance. The rear of the helmet is smooth with a vertical black strip and additional paneling, while the lower front features small, rectangular vent slits. The overall design is utilitarian and protective, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A weathered, off-white helmet with digital camouflage, a black T-shaped full-face visor, and technical side details, evoking a sci-fi military style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black T-shaped visor, angular cheek guards, central ridge, and lower vent slits.
description_view_1: Front-left angle highlights the circular side detail, ribbed tubes, and the helmet's rounded contour.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the smooth back, central vertical black strip, and subtle paneling.
description_view_3: Rear-right angle displays the side mechanical detail, ribbed tubes, and the helmet's weathered surface.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two small rectangular vent slits at the lower front, symmetrically placed; no other visible vents.
attribute_graphic_design: Digital camouflage pattern in off-white and light tan, with weathering and scuff marks; no text or imagery.
